user.title: Select County
user.description: Select the county where the store is located.

interval.title: Refresh Interval
interval.description: Set how often the machine status should be refreshed.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to FamilyMart API.

init.title: Settings
init.description: Set how often the machine status should be refreshed.

update.name: Refresh laundry data
update.description: Manually refresh Fami Laundry machine status.

store_ids.name: Store IDs
store_ids.description: Store IDs to refresh. Leave empty to refresh all stores.

polling_failing.title: Fami Laundry API unreachable
polling_failing.description: Sustained polling failures for store {store_id}. Check that Home Assistant can reach the FamilyMart API and review the integration log for details. The notification clears automatically once polling succeeds again.
